content: Loi thuong gap: Quen nhan dao ham lop trong khi dung chain rule. Cach sua: viet ro u = g(x), sau do nhan them u'.
Loi thuong gap: Viet sai dau cua (cos x)' thanh +sin x. Nho rang (cos x)' = -sin x.
Loi thuong gap: Thieu ngoac o tu so trong quy tac thuong. Cach sua: viet day du (u'v - uv')/v^2 truoc khi rut gon.
